top_choice.rationale: This is a release-triggered post about an open-source model with a clear resource entry link. The source focuses on what was launched, why it matters, and where to learn more, rather than giving a detailed adoption path, old-vs-new migration, or feature boundary guidance. That fits a resource/showcase release best.
triggered_routing_signals: Explicit launch language: announcing, introducing, released
Value framed as accuracy, detail, and global consistency improvements
Reader payoff is click-through evaluation, not immediate implementation
ambiguity_notes: It is a release post, but not a strong adoption playbook because no quickstart or usage boundaries appear.
It could weakly resemble feature_playbook, but the source is too showcase-led.

alternative_choices.rationale: A realistic alternative because the post introduces a new model capability and names the underlying vision model, but the source lacks enough concept clarification, best practices, or when-to-use guidance for this to be the best fit.
triggered_routing_signals: Some mechanism mention via DINOv3 Sat-L
ambiguity_notes: Rejected as top choice because the post does not explain practical usage or boundaries.

alternative_choices.rationale: Only a weak competitor. The post implies improvement over prior mapping quality, but it does not establish an old baseline pain, migration path, or hands-on adoption flow.
ambiguity_notes: Rejected because there is no explicit old-vs-new pain framing or adoption process.

final_decision.rationale: This is a release-triggered post about an open-source model with a clear resource entry link. The source focuses on what was launched, why it matters, and where to learn more, rather than giving a detailed adoption path, old-vs-new migration, or feature boundary guidance. That fits a resource/showcase release best.
